UI_SafehouseInventory_MainPanelInfo: Your Safehouse inventory is the list of all the items inside your safehouse. You can use the manage zones button to designate one or more zones in your safehouse or safehouses.
UI_SafehouseInventory_ZoneManagerDesc: Safehouse zones are used to mark your safehouse(s), or areas within your safehouse.
UI_SafehouseInventory_ZoneUpdateHint: If you are too far from a zone, its inventory will only be updated when you return.
UI_SafehouseInventory_ZoneAddHowTo: Click and drag to designate your Safehouse zone.
UI_SafehouseInventory_NotInSafehouse: You can only create a zone inside a safehouse you own or are a member of. Claim a safehouse first (right-click a building).
UI_SafehouseInventory_Opt_Badge: Show a house badge on items you have at your safehouse
UI_SafehouseInventory_Opt_Tooltip: Show safehouse stock (per zone) in item tooltips
